title: AMP DROP-IN CENTER - 211info
text: ARTISTS MENTORSHIP PROGRAM AMP DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center with access to music lessons, art workshops, recording studio sessions, roleplaying game sessions, cultural outings, meals, hygiene supplies, clothing, first aid supplies, and mentorship services. 16 NW Broadway Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Homeless youth ages 15-25 Hours: Monday-Thursday 4pm-8pm, Friday by appointment only Email (503) 481-4970 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 481-4970 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet MAX Green and Yellow Lines and bus lines 12, 17, 19, 20, 54 Services: Arts and Crafts Instruction * Homeless Youth First Aid Kits * Homeless Youth General Clothing Provision * Homeless Youth Homeless Drop In Centers * Youth Issues Mentoring Programs * Homeless Youth Music Instruction * Homeless Youth Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homeless Youth Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
